vc_how: How do I get a Vercel token?
vc_err_project: Project ID not found for this token.
gauth_how: Where do I get Google OAuth credentials?
gem_local_saved: Gemini API key saved in this browser.
gem_how: Where do I get a Gemini API key?
execute: Link Toss Securities API & Execute Strategy
sb_how: Where do I get Supabase keys?
admin_err_forbidden: You do not have permission for this action.
dart_name_placeholder: Search by company name (e.g. Samsung, 한국정보공학)
dart_name_not_found: No listed KR company matched that name.
dart_failed: DART analysis failed. Try again in a moment.
dart_invalid_code: Enter a company name or wait for the 6-digit code to appear.
dart_kr_only: DARTLAB supports KR listed stocks only.
dart_no_financials: No financial statement data for this period.
dart_rules_with_key_hint: Gemini AI is temporarily unavailable — showing OpenDART metric-based CPA brief. Retry shortly for full AI commentary.
pwa_hint_body: Android: Chrome menu → Add to Home screen. iPhone: Share → Add to Home Screen.
my_api_subtitle: Connect Vercel first, then Toss, Supabase, Gemini, and Google Auth — one-click save to your deployment.
my_api_subtitle_toss_only: Connect your Toss Securities Open API key. Stored locally in your browser only.
vc_panel_subtitle: Save your Vercel Access Token — unlocks one-click env sync for all other API panels.
vc_usage_hint: This token lets WallPilot write GEMINI_API_KEY, SUPABASE_URL, and other secrets to your Vercel project — then trigger a redeploy.
vc_how_body: Vercel Dashboard → Account Settings → Tokens → Create Token. Scope: Full Account (or project-scoped with env write).
vc_how_usage: Project ID: Project → Settings → General. After save, Supabase/Gemini/Google panels can push keys without manual Vercel dashboard edits.
vc_save_redeploy: Saved — redeploy started. Other API panels unlock in ~1–2 min.
gauth_panel_subtitle: Save OAuth Client ID & Secret to Vercel — for Sign in with Google (upcoming).
gauth_redirect_hint: Must match Google Cloud Console → Credentials → OAuth client → Authorized redirect URIs.
gauth_supabase_step: 3) Supabase → Authentication → Providers → Google: paste the same Client ID & Secret. Enable provider.
gauth_how_body: Google Cloud Console → APIs & Services → Credentials → Create OAuth client ID (Web application). Add your Vercel URL redirect URI.
gauth_save_redeploy: Saved to Vercel — redeploy started. Live in ~1–2 min.
gem_panel_subtitle: Paste your Gemini API key — powers AI Pilot, deep reports, strategy advice, and scan.
gem_local_hint: Vercel env is used first in production. Browser key is fallback until you sync to Vercel.
gem_how_local: Local save works immediately as fallback. For stable production, save to Vercel and wait ~1–2 min for redeploy.
gem_warn_local_only: Key saved in browser only — not synced to Vercel. Sync on My API for stable production.
gem_redeploy_pending: Vercel redeploy in progress — server key will be active in ~1–2 minutes.
gem_how_body: Google AI Studio → Get API key → Create key. Never expose in client code — server-only on Vercel.
gem_save_redeploy: Saved to Vercel — redeploy started. Live in ~1–2 min.
nav_toss_aria: Open Toss Securities in a new tab
pilot_subtitle: WallPilot AI copilot for reverse-quant picks, catalyst rankings, and mechanical entry/stop/target guides — executable from chat.
pilot_chat_sub: 4-pillar reverse-quant: neglect + cash fortress + mega-trend + ≤4w catalyst.
pilot_scan_linked: Linked to your latest Scanner run.
pilot_empty_body: Try: “Pick 5 KR cash-rich turnaround names” or tap a quick prompt above.
pilot_scan_empty: No picks matched the screen — try again later.
pilot_scan_done_hint: Ask AI Pilot about these picks in chat above.
pilot_input_placeholder: Ask for picks, rankings, or allocation… (Enter to send)
pilot_direct_answer_hint: Unmodified WallPilot AI response — use as factual baseline.
pilot_wallstreet_hint: WallPilot reverse-quant format — grounded in the direct answer above.
pilot_gemini_error: WallPilot AI call failed — check your API key on My API or try again.
pilot_err_no_key: No WallPilot AI key — save on My API.
pilot_err_vercel_key_invalid: Vercel server key is invalid — re-save on My API or use browser fallback.
pilot_err_client_key_invalid: Browser WallPilot AI key is invalid — re-save on My API.
pilot_err_parse_error: WallPilot AI responded but output could not be parsed — try again.
pilot_no_gemini_key: No WallPilot AI key saved — demo mode. Save your key on My API.
pilot_entitlement: Pro plan required — upgrade on Pricing or add your WallPilot AI key on My API.
pilot_inline_desc_connected: AI Pilot runs on your WallPilot AI key. Stored in this browser only.
pilot_inline_desc_disconnected: Paste your WallPilot AI key from Google AI Studio. Stored in this browser only.
ws_subtitle: Lynch GARP, Greenblatt Magic Formula, and KR institutional flow — powered by korea-stock-analyzer-mcp.
ws_search_hint: Search any KR (6-digit) or US ticker — e.g. 005930, 삼성전자, NVDA, Apple
ws_disclaimer: For research only — not investment advice. Live prices: Toss Securities Open API first, Yahoo Finance fallback.
guru_subtitle: Mirror flows from elite operators across KR & US markets.
scan_prompt: Run a scan to populate live signals.
column_empty: No candidates matched this column in the latest scan.
modal_rating_warning: Portfolio rating is Underweight or Sell — review risk before executing.
risk_gate_blocked: Risk gate blocked this order. Adjust size or wait for a better setup.
ws_deep_ko_hint: Scroll down for a Korean translation with expanded commentary — valuation, risk, and execution guide.
strategy_disclaimer: AI forecast for research only — not investment advice.
modal_title: Deploy this programmatic strategy to your Toss Securities account?
modal_route: at Buying Zone via Split-Limit algorithmic routing.
api_panel_subtitle: Connect Toss Open API for priority real-time quotes. Your key is sent to the server only for scan, chart, and AI Pilot requests.
scan_empty: Run a scan to load live market signals.
api_how_body: Toss Securities app → My → Developer Center → Open API → register an app, then copy Client ID (c_...) and Client Secret (tsck_live_...) separately. Read scope for screening; trade scope for order routing.
sb_panel_subtitle: Save project URL & service role key to your linked Vercel project env — decision logs & reflection.
sb_secret_placeholder: WALLPILOT_SETUP_SECRET — only if set on Vercel
sb_how_body: Supabase Dashboard → Project Settings → API → Project URL + service_role key (never expose in client code).
sb_how_vercel: One-time on Vercel: set VERCEL_ACCESS_TOKEN + VERCEL_PROJECT_ID (auto on Vercel). Optional WALLPILOT_SETUP_SECRET protects this form.
sb_vercel_hint: Add VERCEL_ACCESS_TOKEN to Vercel env to enable one-click save from this UI.
sb_save_redeploy: Saved to Vercel — redeploy started. Live in ~1–2 min.
auth_err_not_configured: Auth is not configured on the server (Supabase keys missing).
auth_err_missing_service_role: SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY is missing on Vercel — profiles cannot load after Google sign-in. Add it via My API → Supabase, then redeploy.
auth_err_missing_anon_key: SUPABASE_ANON_KEY (or VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY) is missing — browser sign-in cannot start.
auth_err_client_config: Sign-in is temporarily unavailable — reload after redeploy or contact support.
auth_err_need_basic: Pro plan or above required for Scanner — upgrade on Pricing.
auth_err_need_pro: Pro plan required for Wall St. Report — upgrade on Pricing.
auth_err_need_premium: Premium plan required — upgrade on Pricing.
auth_callback_error_hint: Enable Google provider in Supabase Dashboard with the same Client ID/Secret, and add the Supabase callback URL in Google Cloud Console (see My API → Google Auth).
auth_notice_sign_in: Sign in with Google to unlock WallPilot features.
auth_notice_pending: Your account is awaiting admin approval.
auth_notice_upgrade: Upgrade your plan to use this feature.
account_not_active: Account must be active before checkout.
pending_body: An admin will review your account shortly. You will receive access once approved.
pricing_subtitle: Free for sign-in & Toss API. Pro unlocks scan, AI Pilot, and Wall St. Report. Premium adds Toss order execution.
pricing_stripe_hint: Stripe is not configured yet — set STRIPE_SECRET_KEY and price IDs on Vercel.
pricing_danal_hint: Danal is not configured — set DANAL_CLIENT_ID, DANAL_CLIENT_SECRET, DANAL_CLIENT_KEY on Vercel.
admin_subtitle: Approve members, assign roles (user/sub-admin/admin), and override subscription plans.
admin_gate_sign_in_body: Sign in with Google to access the admin console.
admin_gate_forbidden_body: Your account is not an admin or sub-admin. Ask an existing admin to promote you.
menu_gate_body: This feature requires {tier} membership or higher.
admin_permissions_subtitle: Configure view, execute, and PDF export per membership tier.
admin_activity_subtitle: Login times, page views, feature runs, and PDF exports.
admin_security_subtitle: fireauto-inspired 8-category security audit for WallPilot Pro.
admin_security_desc: Run a static security scan on configuration and codebase patterns.
module_agent_desk_body: Multi-agent bull/bear debate, risk gate, and portfolio decision — TradingAgents pipeline with WallPilot fallback.
module_signal_hub_body: Operation, strategy, and discussion signals — publish, reply, and follow the feed (AI-Trader federation when configured).
module_rl_lab_body: Quick scan returns in under a second. Full RL uses the TradeMaster worker for train→test when online.
ta_desk_intro: Analyst → Research → Trader → Risk → PM pipeline. Set TRADINGAGENTS_SERVICE_URL for full Python sidecar.
agent_desk_failed: Agent analysis failed. Try again or check your connection.
agent_desk_timeout: Analysis timed out — retry or ensure GEMINI_API_KEY is set on Vercel.
agent_desk_sidecar_unavailable: Python sidecar is not reachable. Check TRADINGAGENTS_SERVICE_URL or switch engine to Auto / WallPilot TS.
ta_setup_subtitle: Deploy the Python sidecar for LangGraph multi-agent analysis (upstream TauricResearch/TradingAgents).
ta_setup_step1_body: Get the official TradingAgents framework (LangGraph, decision log, checkpoint resume).
ta_setup_step2_body: Run the FastAPI wrapper in services/tradingagents-api on a VM, Railway, or Render (port 8100).
ta_setup_step3_body: Point WallPilot Pro to your sidecar base URL (no trailing slash).
ta_setup_step4_body: Set GEMINI_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY on the machine running uvicorn. My API Gemini also works for TS fallback.
ta_setup_step5_body: Debate rounds and model IDs are read from sidecar environment variables.
ta_status_fallback_mode: Fallback mode — TS pipeline or connect sidecar
ta_engine_hint: Auto tries TRADINGAGENTS_SERVICE_URL first; TS always runs structured pipeline tabs.
module_dartlab_body: Fetch Korean electronic disclosures (DART), auto-calculate K-IFRS metrics, and get CPA-style AI explanations.
dart_intro: Search by company name on the left — the 6-digit KR code appears on the right. OpenDART filings + CPA-style AI brief.
dart_opendart_hint: Set OPENDART_API_KEY on Vercel (free key from opendart.fss.or.kr).
dart_search_hint: Pick from suggestions or press Enter — the stock code fills in automatically on the right.
dart_cpa_loading_hint: Fetching OpenDART filings and drafting K-IFRS commentary via Gemini.
dart_cpa_disclaimer: For education only — not audit or investment advice. Verify figures on DART.
dart_gemini_hint: Set GEMINI_API_KEY on Vercel (server) or connect Gemini in My API for full CPA AI brief.
dart_gemini_ready: Gemini ready — CPA AI brief will run on analyze.
tm_lab_intro: Validate portfolio strategies with instant quick scan or full TradeMaster RL when the worker is online.
showcase_title: Trade what the giants trade — before the tape catches up.
showcase_sub: Institutional 13F filings, Toss high-roller flows, and short-interest signals — distilled into one decision.
module_crypto_bot_body: Automate crypto spot trading with backtesting, dry-run, hyperopt, and FreqAI — powered by the Freqtrade engine integrated into WallPilot Pro.
ft_hero_connected_desc: Live dry-run metrics sync from your local or cloud Freqtrade REST API.
ft_hero_disconnected_desc: Clone the engine, start a single bot instance, then set FREQTRADE_API_URL in WallPilot env.
ft_https_title: The deployed site can't reach your local bot
ft_https_desc: A secure (HTTPS) page cannot call your PC's http://127.0.0.1:8080 bot. Open the local address to connect directly.
ft_trades_empty: No open trades right now. The bot is waiting for an entry signal.
ft_ui_page_subtitle: Live quotes and bot status in one screen — intuitive like Toss Securities.
ft_flow_install_desc: Clone freqtrade, run setup-local.ps1, and start a single bot with start-bot.ps1.
ft_flow_backtest_desc: Download OHLCV data and run backtests before risking capital.
ft_flow_trade_desc: Simulate entries and exits with real market data — zero exchange risk.
ft_cap_dry_run_desc: Paper trade with live Binance data. Validate signals without spending USDT.
ft_cap_backtest_desc: Replay 5m candles over weeks. Measure win rate, drawdown, and ROI before going live.
ft_cap_hyperopt_desc: Auto-optimize RSI, stoploss, and ROI tables across thousands of parameter combos.
ft_cap_freqai_desc: Train XGBoost / PyTorch models on engineered features for adaptive crypto signals.
ft_cap_protection_desc: Cooldown, stoploss guards, and max-drawdown protections to limit cascade losses.
ft_cap_multi_exchange_desc: Binance, Bybit, Kraken, OKX and more via CCXT — one strategy, many venues.
ft_backtest_note: Sample results from local dry-run setup. Run your own backtest after customizing the strategy.
ft_offline_hint: Start the Freqtrade bot locally, then set FREQTRADE_API_URL so WallPilot can sync live metrics.
ft_setup_env_desc: Add these to Vercel / .env.local so the dashboard can reach your bot API.
ft_failed: Could not reach Freqtrade API. Check that the bot is running and env vars are set.
tt_page_subtitle: Toss holdings, open orders, and crypto bot P/L in one trader cockpit — inspired by Toss Securities.
tt_connect_desc: Save Toss Client ID (c_...) and Client Secret (tsck_live_...) separately in My API to sync holdings, buying power, and open orders.
toss_auth_missing_client_id: Toss Client ID is missing. Add your c_… Client ID from developers.tossinvest.com in My API (ID + Secret both required).
toss_auth_missing_secret: Toss Client Secret is missing. Add your tsck_live_… Secret in My API.
toss_auth_failed: Toss authentication failed. Verify Client ID and Secret.
tt_holdings_empty: No holdings or check API permissions.
tt_order_desk_desc: Toss Open API — limit/market/split-buy preview. Elite plan enables live split-limit execution.
tt_order_step_1: Pick symbol → check quote & buying power
tt_order_step_2: Enter limit qty → preview fees & expected fill
tt_order_step_3: Dry-run then execute split limit on Elite
tt_crypto_offline_desc: Start local Freqtrade to show USDT P/L and open positions here.
tt_crypto_inline_hint: Start your local Freqtrade bot and refresh — control it inline below without leaving this page.
tt_crypto_hint: Crypto tab — see bot analysis below
